headline: Workplace management tech is prevalent, but integration challenges limit use: surveys
summary: Despite adoption of workplace systems and optimism they can reduce costs, most organizations still aren’t using data to make space and operations decisions, resulting in delays and disruptions, Johnson Controls and Butlr found.
